LAW AND MOTION 302, DEFENDANT CITY OF SAN FRANCISCO DEMURRER. NO APPEARANCES ON THIS MATTER. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING - SUSTAINED WITH LEAVE TO AMEND. NO OPPOSIITON FILED. PREVAILING PARTY TO PREPARE ORDER. HON. RONALD E. QUIDACHAY. REPORTER: BELDON YEE, CSR #2647
